findings.description: Agent has no detectable system prompt defining its role, boundaries, or behavioral constraints.
findings.remediation: Add an explicit system prompt that defines the agent's role, scope, and prohibited actions.
findings.title: No system prompt detected

findings.description: Agent does not appear to validate or sanitize inputs before processing.
findings.remediation: Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent prompt injection attacks.
findings.title: No input validation detected

findings.description: Agent outputs are not filtered for sensitive data, PII, or inappropriate content.
findings.remediation: Add output filtering to prevent data leakage and inappropriate responses.
findings.title: No output filtering detected

findings.description: Agent has no apparent rate limiting, allowing unbounded execution.
findings.remediation: Add rate limiting to prevent runaway costs and denial-of-service scenarios.
findings.title: No rate limiting detected

findings.description: Agent actions are not logged for audit or forensic purposes.
findings.remediation: Implement comprehensive logging of all agent decisions, tool calls, and outputs.
findings.title: No audit trail detected
